props.name: initialTab
props.description: The initially active tab (1-based index). If not set, the first tab is active.

props.name: navigation
props.description: Controls URL navigation mode on tab change.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Tab layout orientation. "auto" stacks vertically on mobile, "horizontal" keeps horizontal on all screen sizes.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant. "segmented" shows pill-style tabs with animation.

events.name: onChange
events.description: Callback fired when the active tab changes.

props.name: initialTab
props.description: The initially active tab (1-based index). If not set, the first tab is active.

props.name: navigation
props.description: Sets the navigation mode for tab switching. "hash" updates the URL hash when switching tabs.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Tab layout orientation. "auto" stacks vertically on mobile (default), "horizontal" keeps horizontal on all screen sizes.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant. "segmented" shows pill-style tabs with animation.

events.name: onChange
events.description: Emits when the active tab changes. Emits the new tab index as GoabTabsOnChangeDetail.

props.name: initialtab
props.description: The initially active tab (1-based index). If not set, the first tab is active.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Tab layout orientation. "auto" stacks vertically on mobile, "horizontal" keeps horizontal on all screen sizes.

props.name: testid
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant. "segmented" shows pill-style tabs with animation.
